notes: Wave 12 Track A candidate, from country-hub-data.js gap scan.
Date rule (floating, month 9, weekday Monday, nth 1) confirmed via WebSearch against canada.ca federal holiday list and timeanddate.com.

Competitor check: arabz.ca mentions it only inside a general holiday-list article, no dedicated countdown page; Arabic Wikipedia is encyclopedic with no year-specific date; no Arabic competitor addresses the Canada/US date-coincidence confusion or the Labour Day vs May Day (international) confusion.

Differentiator: cultural framing as the unofficial end of Canadian summer + back-to-school timing, plus explicit disambiguation from both US Labor Day (same date, separate law) and international Workers' Day (May 1).
